channel.title: 林中路
channel.description: This is my description that will be used in the meta tags and important for search results

item.title: 使用 CDN 优化 Gatsby 站点的访问速度
item.description: 为博客加上 jsDelivr 全球高速静态资源访问服务
item.dc:creator: hidaris

item.title: My first post using Novela by Narative
item.description: With the growing community interest in Gatsby, we hope to create more resources that make it easier for anyone to grasp the power of this incredible tool.
item.dc:creator: hidaris

item.title: 编译器设计：what is compiler?
item.description: Compilers are percieved to be magical artifacts, carefully crafted by the wizards, and unfathomable by the mere mortals.
item.dc:creator: hidaris

item.title: 分布式系统笔记：RPC
item.description: RPC ideally makes net communication look just like fn call
item.dc:creator: hidaris

item.title: 分布式系统笔记：CAP定理
item.description: 分布式系统中各个节点的状态如何同步是一个难题，CAP 定理是这个问题相关的定理,也是很多分布式系统设计的理论基础
item.dc:creator: hidaris

item.title: 为 emacs lsp python 添加 virtualenv 支持
item.description: emacs lsp-mode 不支持 virtualenv，在此分享我的解决方案
item.dc:creator: hidaris

item.title: The Expression Problem Revisited
item.description: The Expression Problem is a new name for an old problem. The goal is to define a datatype by cases, where one can add new cases to the datatype and new functions over the datatype, without recompiling existing code, and while retaining static type safety (e.g., no casts).
item.dc:creator: hidaris
